ItacWorkItem.Notes: The document is a request by the Academia Veneziana to the Venetian authorities to obtain the priviledge for books published by the Academy, and for those listed in the catalogue Somma delle opere etc. See Renouard, Annales, 1835, p. 277, n.34.
ItacWorkItem.Citation: Lorenza Gianfrancesco and Simone Testa, directed by Jane Everson, Denis Reidy, Lisa Sampson, assisted by Thomas Denman, for the Italian Academies Database project.
